description: Configure the OpenBCI GUI to stream data via LSL and OSC protocols for a real-time BCI experiment. Add the Networking widget to the layout and configure Stream 1 for LSL protocol with TimeSeries data. Configure Stream 2 for OSC protocol with FFT data using IP address 127.0.0.1 and port 12345. Start the data streams and save a screenshot of the configured Networking widget to ~/Documents/OpenBCI_GUI/Screenshots/networking_config.png.
